title: Oozing magma
description: makes Oozing effect spawn Magma Cubes in the Nether
body:
# Overview:

"Oozing Magma" is a micro mod that spawns magma cubes instead of slimes when using oozing potion effect in nether.

# Mod compatibility
- Server compatibility: Will work without requiring the mod on client side.
- Client side compatibility: Will be added as optional, if any.
- Dimension compat: The mod considers a dimension nether if it has the ultrawarm property.

# Future plans
- [ ] Add gamerule to control mod
- [ ] Add a chance to summon magma cubes in overworld with oozing
- [ ] Add the same for slimes in nether
 
# Credits:
[A11v1r15](https://modrinth.com/user/A11v1r15) for creating the original mod
